chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6760 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.18049/2025 (Contempt) 2. For order on CMA No.11576/2025 (Contempt) 26.9.2025 Syed Sultan Ahmed advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant AG Ms. Humaira Jatoi advocate for SBCA -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner has claimed that the SHO of Gulistan-e- Jauhar Police Station, Karachi is harassing the petitioner. Learned AAG states that this is not the case. Be that as it may, SHO Gulistan-e-Jauhar Police Station, Karachi is directed to act strictly in accordance with law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SSP Karachi East, for compliance. Contempt applications stand disposed of. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
